summary: Coach Watch scheduled auto-scanning feature testing complete. All 10/10 backend tests passed. Verified: subscription enforcement (403 for basic tier on scan/alerts), individual alert accessible for all tiers (Journey page), background task startup confirmed in logs, DuckDuckGo real web search implementation confirmed, notifications for red/yellow alerts implemented.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Subscription enforcement uses auto_reply_detection flag (False for basic, True for pro/premium)
VERIFIED: Individual alert endpoint (/alert/{university_name}) intentionally has NO subscription check for Journey page
VERIFIED: Background task creates asyncio task on startup, properly cancels on shutdown
VERIFIED: 7-day interval (604800 seconds) in background task sleep
VERIFIED: Notifications created for red/yellow severity alerts via create_notification helper
VERIFIED: Alerts stored in coach_watch_alerts collection with all required fields
context_for_next_testing_agent: Coach Watch feature fully implemented. Basic tier users get 403 on /scan and /alerts endpoints. Individual alert endpoint works for all users (needed by Journey page badges). Background task runs every 7 days for premium tenants only. To test actual scan flow with real news search and LLM analysis, need a premium tier user.

POST_scan_403_basic_tier.basic_tier_response: 403 Forbidden - 'Coach Watch requires a Premium plan.'

GET_alerts_403_basic_tier.basic_tier_response: 403 Forbidden - 'Coach Watch requires a Premium plan.'

background_task_startup.log_message: Coach Watch background task started (7-day interval)
